The '''RM-09 Alliance Shuttle''' was a craft employed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] was used to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] various Rebellion units and dignitaries across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was only lightly armed and could not protect itself well against enemy attacks, so it almost always required an escort.<ref name="EaW" />

The RM-09 was similar in appearance to the [[Republic Troop Transport/Legends|Republic Troop Transport]], used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="EaW" />

==History==
A number of these shuttles were used during the [[Raid over Corulag|siege]] of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] installation over [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], where they would deploy infantry into the space station to search for information on the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="EaW" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
